name: RYTHM, Inc.
business: RYTHM, Inc. sells hemp-derived THC products under brands including RYTHM, incredibles, Dogwalkers, Beboe, &Shine, Doctor Solomon s, Good Green and Se orita, and licenses its brands for manufacturing and distribution.

exposures.sentence: The Company s portfolio of consumer-packaged goods brands includes RYTHM, incredibles, Dogwalkers, Beboe, &Shine, Doctor Solomon s, Good Green and Se orita.

catalysts.sentence: The May 2025 Notes will mature on November 22, 2026
The August 2025 Notes will mature on February 25, 2027

catalysts.event: Effective date of hemp definition amendment in 2026 Appropriations Act if not repealed
catalysts.sentence: the change does not become effective until November 12, 2026
